{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322075511A1F7FCA66076E1868EEB"}"},"total":616},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7571216764001305369","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"成长的路上总是有很多阻挠，一部女主成长记，最后女主杀疯了，人物刻画细腻，情节丝丝入扣，非常值得推荐的一本书[赞][赞][赞][酷][酷]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1762816987,"group_id":"7527588586791636030","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"看我头像！跟我一起拿捏番茄吧！玄幻小说我的最爱，脑洞越大，我越嗨！也感谢你读我的书🔥🔥🔥🔥","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nyo0lydUPVRqTNwqkzqEwg968FfHTrUZMCwIQUN5F0Oh","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/d987f52acb6f4d22b57a1723c5578ef7~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776704579&x-signature=Asv%2BK6B3jR%2BxGGriZv332lMRdow%3D","user_id":"4475448868995340","user_name":"长眉大夏"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4475448868995340","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1772966299,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author_level_2","intro":"{"title_name":"作家Lv.2","title_id":"author_level_2"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家Lv.2","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家Lv.2"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7527588586791636030","book_info":{"abstract":"纯无CP，三观正，大女主，有格局，无雌竞，无男主，无暧昧，不受委屈，女强！
多元素：玄幻+江湖+非传统修仙+多世界+长生不老，成长型侠义人设。
无单箭头，无金手指，无极品，无关风月，后续会自己炼化世界和空间。
纯原创手敲文，废稿15w字，每一个字都是小西认真敲出来的，码字不易，在此拜谢所有观看、支持和关注的宝子！
*
非重生穿越、无系统，无奇葩极品，无金手指，女主靠自己的坚韧和聪慧一路崛起。
*
纯正华夏人写的文，非冷血无情女主，没有是非不分、三观不正、残暴、自私或冷血弑杀的阴暗情节。
*
师徒之缘，知遇之恩，救命之情，同行之谊，神魂破碎之痛，诡异的凝视。
流落在外的痴傻哑女，突然觉醒，被诡异邪恶的鬼脸纠缠，被镇压的神魂，身中奇毒，一切都透露着不寻常，九年后她回到初次醒来的地方，无意中跌落其他世界，被困四百多年，她从未放弃希望，一面让自己变得更加强大一面寻找回归的路。
脱困后，她已成长为人人都要尊称一声前辈的大能，也是在这里，她发现了世界残酷的本质。
倘若世间的本质是弱肉强食，那我就要做那个制定规则之人！
*
注：第一个世界涉及常规古代世界所以有男属下，后面的世界女宝们陆续上场，介意可以直接跳过不喜欢的情节。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/751ec6b1daf1f505922fd81c0f44bbec~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"木格西","author_id":"","book_id":"7527588586791636030","book_name":"血咒，虚空凝望之眼","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#182828","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":248,"name":"玄幻言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=248&name=玄幻言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":32,"name":"幻想言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=32&name=幻想言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":86,"name":"女强","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=86&name=女强&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":392,"name":"无CP","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=392&name=无CP&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7537175922068161048","read_count":"19330","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"610294"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.3","serial_count":"289","tags":"玄幻言情,幻想言情,女强,无敌,无CP","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/3ce5e1813efe205544c7290d9936db06~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779321311&x-signature=JBVfmrFDTR%2Bc3E2PniPP6sOJTeI%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2098324567494263","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"140"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322075511A1F7FCA66076E1868EEB"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读18小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":11,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":63024,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":63582,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":3267},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1762819486,"author_reply_time":1762819501,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7591524424321450776","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"挖到宝！《逃亡路上像条狗》堪称良心玄幻佳作，果断加书架！纯正华夏文风，三观超正，无任何阴暗情节与狗血对立，无CP设定专注成长，看着超舒心。女主从落魄哑女到制定规则的大能，无金手指加持，全靠自身坚韧与心性，百年被困仍向阳而生。江湖气与玄幻感拉满，师徒情、同行谊格外暖心，剧情紧凑有深度，越看越上头，值得所有人追更！","text_exts":[{"e":111,"s":107,"text":"向阳而生","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%90%91%E9%98%B3%E8%80%8C%E7%94%9F&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774137311E1868EEB%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227591524424321450776%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227527588586791636030%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%90%91%E9%98%B3%E8%80%8C%E7%94%9F%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1767542601,"group_id":"7527588586791636030","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3IW0IKBLf5Mg3FVzGcwjvRpdEPacMJwXCKCCj0tVVAf","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/0dfff71ac4c3492f9d383e80d8f88e6d~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776701378&x-signature=X7Gx%2FYQ9s9X326zghaVnkMytFU8%3D","user_id":"3620049053297464","user_name":"雨夜无风"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3620049053297464","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"svip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p6-novel. show_pv":2587},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1767542887,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7610420680920056601","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书最打动我的，不是爽点，而是女主真正的强大，内心的坚韧强大，是她永远不放弃，永远坚信希望！
女主从最卑微的逃亡开始，被践踏、被追杀，却从未向黑暗低头，也从未因苦难变得扭曲冷血。她不依附、不乞求、不沉沦。
她的强大，不是天赋，不是外挂，而是绝境里不折的骨气、初心不改的善良、黑暗中不灭的意志。这才是真正的大女主，历经千帆，仍做自己的光，手握利刃，仍怀人性！
无Cp，没有雌竞，女子们相互之间有救赎有互动，非常好。
三观正，性格好，没有任何情爱的文，和专注写故事的作者大大，必须支持！！！！","text_exts":[{"e":156,"s":153,"text":"大女主","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%A4%A7%E5%A5%B3%E4%B8%BB&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774137311E1868EEB%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227610420680920056601%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227527588586791636030%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%A4%A7%E5%A5%B3%E4%B8%BB%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1771940843,"group_id":"7527588586791636030","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0DTnTpaWw2raWpgppEJWqydn2n3AvAltFPxrQ54RvV7","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/8b91e01a7b0242389b43128fe854e4b7~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"1751976117284266","user_name":"喜欢暹罗鳄的武兄"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1751976117284266","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":16,"fan_ranklist_title":"真爱粉","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7527588586791636030","book_info":{"abstract":"纯无CP，三观正，大女主，有格局，无雌竞，无男主，无暧昧，不受委屈，女强！
